goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 10:00'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should depart from bishops stortford
The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 10:00
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the centre and should be in the type of hotel
